entries.chavacano: juego juego lang kita, no hace arroz arroz el juego
entries.english: it’s just a game. don’t take it seriously

entries.chavacano: ya arya conele de suyo nana cuando ya sabe cae ta man novio-novio
entries.english: her mother drove her away when the mother knew that she’s having a boyfriend

entries.chavacano: bien balimbing gayot diamond barrio capitan
entries.english: our barangay captain is a turncoat person

entries.chavacano: man sungkit gayod yo el maga estrella para contigo
entries.english: i will reach for the stars for you

entries.chavacano: travesa yo monte y aplaya para mira lang contigo
entries.english: i will cross the mountain and sea jusft to see you

entries.chavacano: bulao man gayod este si juan. pensa'y pensa con el novia
entries.english: juan is out of his mind. he always thinks of his girlfriend

entries.chavacano: bungul man gayod vo! saca daw quel oh!
entries.english: you’re so deaf! get that one!
to find ways to earn money, to earn for a living, to work

entries.chavacano: luego ya, noy. busca anay yo cen
entries.english: later, son. i will still look for it
to earn for a living, to work

entries.chavacano: ta busca/ta man la vida pa mi tata
entries.english: my father is still working or earning for a living

entries.chavacano: enante pa yo ya habla cae baña. cabrito gaja este ele oh
entries.english: i have already told you to take a bath. maybe you are a goat
used when something bad happened because someone said it

entries.chavacano: bien caliente boca man gayod vos! ya perde ya lng yo na puestahan
entries.english: you really have a hot mouth! (look) i lost in betting

entries.chavacano: libre tamen alli. cencillo lang se contigo
entries.english: you also treat us. it’s just nothing to you

entries.chavacano: ya queda cencillo el motor por causa na accidente
entries.english: the motorcycle broke into pieces because of the accident
expression of certainty or of favorable conclusion especially when someone or a group is likely to win a game

entries.chavacano: gana ya kita. claro ya el basilan
entries.english: i can already see that we will win

entries.chavacano: conviene con vos! ama pa con ele
entries.english: you deserve it! go and love him/her again

entries.chavacano: quien aquel ele? bien ma-cupal man aquel
entries.english: who is he/she? he/she is very arrogant
one who lives in a very far place

entries.chavacano: bien alboroto man gayod kamo. de alla alla siguro kamo
entries.english: you are very noisy. you probably live in a very far place

entries.chavacano: ta duele mi orejas cada vez le conversa
entries.english: it’s irritable every time he/she speaks

entries.chavacano: ya habla ya no anda alla. tampa duro man gayod. conviene con vos
entries.english: i told you not to go there. you think you’re brave. good for you
used to tell that someone acts like somebody

entries.chavacano: evos ya! cosa bo ta pensa comigo, no sabe?
entries.english: you already! what do you think of me, i don’t know it?

entries.chavacano: grande tai daw aquel quien ya muri alla oh
entries.english: accordingly, that man who passed away is influential/rich

entries.chavacano: hinde gane aquel ele invitado pero talla na cumpleaño de juan. grueso man aquel el cara
entries.english: he/she is not invited at the birthday party of juan. his/her face is thick
angry; used to tell that someone/something causes someone to be angry

entries.chavacano: maca hirvi sangre man gayod mira con aquellos de coche ta buta lang basura na camino
entries.english: it makes me angry when i see people in the car throwing waste along the road.”

entries.chavacano: taqui lang gane vos na computeran! bien labuyuin gayod vos noy
entries.english: you are just here at the internet cafe! you are so class-cutter
a promise, a curse, say something bad

entries.chavacano: ya larga con ele palabra disuyo tata
entries.english: her father said something bad to her
does not want to accept responsibility or does not want to admit the fault

entries.chavacano: habla ya el verdad. no mas ya lava mano
entries.english: just tell the truth. stop washing your hands

entries.chavacano: hace claro. bien ma eche gayod tu
entries.english: make it clear. you are not straightforward

entries.chavacano: nunca gayod yo pidi ayuda con vos! marca vos mi palabra
entries.english: i will never help you. mark my word

entries.chavacano: si nene dol moneca de pogon si ta llora
entries.english: nene looks ugly when she cries
used to express extreme happiness; extreme laugh

entries.chavacano: maca muri gayod na risas si vice ganda
entries.english: vice ganda will really cause us to laugh extremely

entries.chavacano: juga kamo kanila? na lata lang kamo
entries.english: are you going to play with them? you will not win

entries.chavacano: nineteen ninety calawang pa man gayod se cancion

entries.english: used to tell that someone/something is not beneficial

entries.chavacano: no hay chance sigi con robin
entries.english: there is nothing we can get from being with robin
to look for a way to cause conflict/trouble

entries.chavacano: si arnel ta busca gayod piti pies
entries.english: arnel is really looking for trouble

entries.chavacano: poco se gente na paseo del mar
entries.english: there are so many people at the paseo del mar

entries.chavacano: no hace por pecho el cosa yo ya habla. broma lang aquel
entries.english: do not take seriously what i said. it’s just a joke

entries.chavacano: man libre yo contigo si queda blanco el uwak
entries.english: i will treat you if the crow will turn into black
to hold a grudge or resentment

entries.chavacano: no mas man broma-broma con lizel cae ta siembra se caña
entries.english: don’t you ever make joke with lizel because she really holds a grudge
to be nervous, tensed, worried, anxious

entries.chavacano: ya suda ya lang yo frio enantes na recitacion
entries.english: i was nervous earlier during the recitation

entries.chavacano: dinigrido man se dituyo un ojos. quien contigo ya supla?
entries.english: your eye is black. who hit you?

entries.chavacano: ta mira yo man separtahan se sila
entries.english: i think they will be separated
used when someone insists that he/she is telling the truth

entries.chavacano: nohay daw clase luego habla si sir
entries.english: there will bo no class this afternoon according to our teacher

entries.chavacano: deberasan ba. talli pa el luz
entries.english: it’s true. i’m telling the truth
used with someone who feels or thinks that he/she is important or is somebody

entries.chavacano: no queda tampa si quien si juga basketball
entries.english: don’t act as if you’re somebody when you play basketball

entries.chavacano: por que daw ya accidenta si junjun?
entries.english: why did junjun involve in an accident?

entries.chavacano: enamora ya gaha yo con ele? ta mira uste?
entries.english: am i going to court her already? what do you think?
narrow mind or one who thinks narrowly

entries.chavacano: bien utuk bulinao man gayod bo!
entries.english: you really have a narrow mind

entries.chavacano: noy, baña ya cae yagit ya gayod tu
entries.english: kid, take a shower already because you look so untidy
